description: Uses the shared chat-style run surface from issue activity.

companySkillsDescription: Optional skills from the company library. Built-in Paperclip runtime skills are added automatically.
noCompanySkills: No optional company skills installed yet.
recommendation: We recommend letting your CEO handle agent setup. They know the org structure and can configure reporting, permissions, and adapters.
askCeo: Ask the CEO to create a new agent
advancedDescription: Choose your adapter type for advanced setup.
mac.step2: Hold Option and right-click the folder.
mac.step4: Paste the result into the path input.
mac.tip: You can also open Terminal, type cd, drag the folder into the terminal window, press Enter, then run pwd to see the full path.
windows.step1: Find the folder in File Explorer.
windows.step2: Hold Shift and right-click the folder.
windows.tip: Alternatively, hold Shift and right-click the folder, then select Copy as path.
linux.step1: Open a terminal and navigate to the directory with cd.
linux.step2: Run pwd to print the full path.
linux.step3: Copy the output and paste it here.
linux.tip: In most file managers, Ctrl+L reveals the full path in the address bar.
windows.step4: Paste the result into the path input.
terminal.step3: Copy the output and paste it into the path input.
companyNameHint: The display name for your company.
descriptionHint: Optional description shown in the company profile.
logoHint: Upload a PNG, JPEG, WEBP, GIF, or SVG logo image.
brandColorHint: Sets the hue for the company icon. Leave empty for auto-generated color.
requireBoardApprovalLabel: Require board approval for new hires

feedbackSharingLabel: Allow sharing voted AI outputs with Paperclip Labs
feedbackSharingHint: Only AI-generated outputs you explicitly vote on are eligible for feedback sharing.
feedbackSharingDescription: Votes are always saved locally. This setting controls whether voted AI outputs may also be marked for sharing with Paperclip Labs.
invitesDescription: Generate an OpenClaw agent invite snippet.

descriptionExtended: These settings stay attached to the execution workspace so future runs can keep local paths, repo refs, provisioning, teardown, and runtime-service behavior in sync with the actual workspace being reused.
workspaceSettingsHint: Edit the concrete path, repo, branch, provisioning, teardown, and runtime overrides attached to this execution workspace.
provisionCommandHint: Runs when Paperclip prepares this execution workspace
teardownCommandHint: Runs when the execution workspace is archived or cleaned up
runtimeConfigSourceOverride: This execution workspace currently overrides the project workspace runtime config.

failedToInspect: Failed to inspect workspace close readiness.
sharedWorkspaceReason: This is a shared workspace session. Archiving it removes this session record but keeps the underlying project workspace.
independentCheckoutReason: This execution workspace has its own checkout path and can be archived independently.
projectPrimaryReason: This execution workspace currently points at the project's primary workspace path.
disposableReason: This workspace is disposable and can be archived.
cleanupRetryNotice: Cleanup previously failed on this workspace. Retrying close will rerun the cleanup flow and update the workspace status if it succeeds.

reinstallDescription: This will pull the latest version of {packageName} from npm and hot-swap the running adapter module. Existing agents will use the new version on their next run.
installExternalAdapterDescription: Add an adapter from npm or a local path. The adapter package must export createServerAdapter().
acceptsPlatformPaths: Accepts Linux, WSL, and Windows paths. Windows paths are auto-converted.
alphaNoticeBody: The adapter plugin system is under active development. APIs and storage format may change. Use the power icon to hide adapters from agent menus without removing them.
installAdapterPackageHint: Install an adapter package to extend model support.
removeAdapterDescription: Are you sure you want to remove the {type} adapter? It will be unregistered and removed from the adapter store.
removeAdapterNpmCleanup: npm packages will be cleaned up from disk.

feedbackPreferenceDescription: 投票した AI 出力を Paperclip Labs と共有できるかどうかを選択します。この回答は今後の高評価と低評価の既定値になります。
feedbackVoteAlwaysLocal: この投票は常にローカルに保存されます。
feedbackPreferenceDetails: 今回の投票と今後の投票済み AI 出力を共有するには「常に許可」を選択してください。今回と今後の投票をローカルに保つには「許可しない」を選択してください。
feedbackPreferenceLater: これは後で インスタンス設定 > 一般 から変更できます。

capabilitiesPlaceholder: Describe what this agent is responsible for.
promptTemplatePlaceholder: Add reusable instructions for every run.
promptTemplateWarning: Prompt templates are shared across runs. Keep them reusable and avoid issue-specific details.
noModelDetectedSelectManually: No model was detected yet. Select one manually if needed.
codexMinimalSearchWarning: Minimal reasoning effort may limit Codex search quality.
bootstrapPromptLegacyWarning: This legacy bootstrap prompt is still configured and may affect older runs.
searchModelsCreate: Search or paste a model ID...
markAllAsReadConfirmDescription: This will mark {count} unread item{suffix} as read.
emptySearch: No inbox items match your search.
emptyFiltered: No inbox items match these filters.
undoArchiveFailed: 受信トレイのアーカイブ取り消しに失敗しました
concurrencyCoalesceDescription: If a run is already active, keep just one follow-up run queued.
concurrencyAlwaysEnqueueDescription: Queue every trigger occurrence, even if the routine is already running.
concurrencySkipDescription: Drop new trigger occurrences while a run is still active.
catchUpSkipDescription: Ignore windows that were missed while the scheduler or routine was paused.
catchUpEnqueueDescription: Catch up missed schedule windows in capped batches after recovery.
signingModeBearerDescription: Expect a shared bearer token in the Authorization header.
signingModeHmacDescription: Expect an HMAC SHA-256 signature over the request using the shared secret.
signingModeGithubDescription: Accept GitHub-style X-Hub-Signature-256 header (HMAC over raw body, no timestamp).
signingModeNoneDescription: No authentication. The webhook URL itself acts as a shared secret.
runFailedBody: Paperclip could not start the routine run.
addTriggerFailedBody: Paperclip could not create the trigger.
triggerSavedBody: The routine cadence update was saved.
updateTriggerFailedBody: Paperclip could not update the trigger.
deleteTriggerFailedBody: Paperclip could not delete the trigger.
rotateSecretFailedBody: Paperclip could not rotate the webhook secret.
defaultAgentRequiredBody: Set a default agent before enabling routine automation.
saveSecretNow: Save this now. Paperclip will not show the secret value again.
defaultAgentRequiredBanner: Default agent required. This routine can stay as a draft and still run manually, but automation stays paused until you assign a default agent.
createdBodyLiveWorkflow: Add the first trigger to turn it into a live workflow.
createdBodyDraft: Draft saved. Add a default agent before enabling automation.
newRoutineDescription: Define the recurring work first. Default project and agent are optional for draft routines.
advancedDeliveryDescription: Keep policy controls secondary to the work definition.
afterCreationHint: After creation, Paperclip takes you straight to trigger setup. Draft routines stay paused until you add a default agent.
newKeyHint: Use lowercase letters, numbers, -, or _, and start with a letter or number.
requiredKeyAndBody: Document key and body are required
keyValidationError: Document key must start with a letter or number and use only lowercase letters, numbers, -, or _.
remoteChangedReloadFailed: Document changed remotely and the latest version could not be loaded
saveOrCancelBeforeHistory: Save or cancel your local changes before viewing an older revision.
viewingRevisionBody: This is a historical preview. Restoring it creates a new latest revision and keeps history append-only.
outOfDateBody: This document changed while you were editing. Your local draft is preserved and autosave is paused.
deleteConfirm: Delete this document? This cannot be undone.
taskAssignHintCreator: Enabled automatically while this agent can create new agents.
taskAssignHintGrant: Enabled via explicit company permission grant.
canCreateAgentsDescription: Lets this agent create or hire agents and implicitly assign tasks.
loadWorkspaceLogFailed: Failed to load workspace operation log
instructionsBundlesOnlyLocal: Instructions bundles are only available for local adapters.
modeTooltip: Managed: Paperclip stores and serves the instructions bundle. External: you provide a path on disk where the instructions live.
rootPathTooltip: The absolute directory on disk where the instructions bundle lives. In managed mode this is set by Paperclip automatically.
entryFileTooltip: The main file the agent reads first when loading instructions. Defaults to AGENTS.md.
virtualFileTooltip: Legacy inline prompt - this deprecated virtual file preserves the old promptTemplate content
openClawSkillsUnsupported: Paperclip cannot manage OpenClaw skills here. Visit your OpenClaw instance to manage this agent's skills.
skillsUnsupported: Paperclip cannot manage skills for this adapter yet. Manage them in the adapter directly.
manageSkillsInAdapter: Manage skills in the adapter directly.
importSkillsFirst: Import skills into the company library first, then attach them here.
unmanagedSkillsTitle: ({count}) User-installed skills, not managed by Paperclip
requestedSkillsMissing: Requested skills missing from the company library
clearSessionsConfirm: Clear session for {count} issue{suffix} touched by this run?
noPersistedTranscript: No persisted transcript for this run.
apiKeyCreated: API key created - copy it now, it will not be shown again.
createApiKeyDescription: API keys allow this agent to authenticate calls to the Paperclip server.
createSecretFromCurrentValue: Create secret from current plain value
storeValueAsSecret: Store value as secret and replace with reference
runtimeInjectedHint: PAPERCLIP_* variables are injected automatically at runtime.
secretProviderDescription: This secret is stored securely via the Paperclip secret provider.
